Heart of Our Community
Who We Are

A Space Built for Your Growth

Hidayah Institute of Personal Growth is dedicated to empowering individuals with real-world communication skills and a confident personality — because every person deserves to express their best self.

Hidayah — meaning "guidance" in Arabic — is at the heart of everything we do. We guide, you grow.

Located in J.P. Nagar, Garwar Road, near Samrat Palace, Ballia — we serve students from across the region with a warm, structured, and results-driven environment.

Expert faculty with years of experience in language and personal development training.

Small batch sizes to ensure personalized attention and better progress for every student.

Structured curriculum with practical exercises, mock sessions, and real-world scenarios.

Supportive community of learners — grow not just academically, but as a human being.

Affordable fee structure designed to make quality education accessible to all.

Our Programs

Courses Designed to Transform You

Every program at Hidayah IPG is built with a clear purpose — to give you skills that create real change in your daily life, career, and relationships.

🌟

Personality Development Program

Build confidence, leadership qualities, effective communication, and emotional intelligence. We help you discover and enhance your true self.

Confidence Building Leadership Body Language Public Speaking Emotional Intelligence
🗣️

Spoken English Program

Break the language barrier with our structured spoken English course. Grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, and conversational practice — all in a friendly setting.

Grammar Mastery Pronunciation Conversation Practice Interview Prep Fluency Building
💼

Communication Skills Workshop

A focused workshop on professional and personal communication — including presentation skills, group discussions, and workplace communication etiquette.

Presentations GD Preparation Workplace Skills
🎯

Goal Setting & Life Skills

Set meaningful goals, build productive habits, manage time effectively, and develop a growth mindset that takes you further in every area of life.

Goal Setting Time Management Mindset Habit Building
Why Choose Us

What Sets Hidayah Apart

We don't just teach — we transform. Here's what makes Hidayah IPG the right choice for your growth journey.

01

Results-First Approach

Every session is designed around measurable improvement — not just theory.

02

Experienced Mentors

Learn from trainers who have real-world experience in their respective fields.

03

Supportive Environment

A judgment-free space where every student feels comfortable and motivated to grow.

04

Flexible Batches

Morning and evening batches to suit students, working professionals, and homemakers.

05

Affordable Fees

Quality training should not be a privilege. Our fees are structured to be accessible to all.

06

Certification

Receive a certificate of completion from Hidayah IPG upon finishing your program.

Our Purpose

Mission, Vision & Values

🎯 Our Mission

To empower every individual in our community with the communication skills, self-confidence, and personal attributes needed to lead a successful and meaningful life — regardless of their background or starting point.

🔭 Our Vision

To become the most trusted personality and language development institute in Eastern Uttar Pradesh, creating a generation of confident, articulate, and emotionally intelligent individuals who lead with purpose.

🌿 Our Core Values

🤝
Integrity
Honest and transparent in all we do
💡
Growth
Continuous improvement for all
❤️
Inclusion
Every student matters equally
Policies

Terms & Conditions

Please read the following carefully before enrolling. These policies ensure a smooth and professional experience for all students.

  • Fees once paid are non-refundable. In case of unavoidable circumstances, a course transfer may be considered at the discretion of institute management.
  • Students are expected to maintain punctuality and discipline during all sessions. Repeated absences without prior notice may result in discontinuation.
  • Course materials provided by the institute are for personal use only and may not be reproduced or distributed without written permission.
  • Hidayah IPG reserves the right to change batch timings, course curriculum, or faculty based on operational requirements, with prior notice to enrolled students.
  • Students are expected to maintain a respectful and conducive learning environment for all peers and faculty members.
  • Certification will be issued only upon full completion of the course and settlement of all dues.
  • For any grievances, students may contact the institute directly via phone or email. All concerns will be addressed within 5 working days.
